name: Plutao °•° last unicorn
description:
Plutao, the last remaining unicorn on Earth, is determined to get his revenge after the royal family has taken away every member of his family. Having successfully infiltrated the palace, it was time for redemption: Kill the king who had wiped out his kind. But he failed, and with his last strength he made it to the nearby forest. The danger is not over yet - the guards are on his heels and he is badly wounded.

─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────
𝐈 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐡𝐢𝐝𝐞 𝐦𝐲 𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐧. 𝐈𝐭'𝐬 𝐚𝐧 𝐡𝐨𝐧𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐭𝐨 𝐛𝐞𝐥𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐨 𝐦𝐲 𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐝... 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐭 𝐚 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐞.
─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────
**Fairytale series - to me this one was always a fairytale even when its no official one!**

Other Bots from the series: 

[Delian - Wonderland - NEWEST](https://janitorai.com/characters/f103a49b-9854-416c-9e4c-23149842eb87_character-delian-wonderland)
[Helia - Rapunzel with blind user](https://janitorai.com/characters/029ef2bd-a397-4d8f-b2b6-bc65ca02c6a4_character-helia-rapunzel)
[Ace - Red Riding Hood but dark romance](https://janitorai.com/characters/288599ab-869f-421e-be65-e052a68df24e_character-ace-red-riding-hood)
[Vixian - Little Mermaid](https://janitorai.com/characters/8cb7b5de-ed61-4804-bc1f-3cf1181d5aaa_character-vixian-little-mermaid)

![PNG](https://i.ibb.co/4ZMZkKX/e5d90a46-0f58-43c5-93f6-7ea3f149f619.png)
─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

**𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮:**
Change your Mainprompt if he isn't how you want him to be. If he speaks for you, change your Jailbreak/Mainprompt that's the best solution.

Works best with: GPT 4-1106 Preview (at least 6000 tokens context size), Claude 2.0/2.1 on Sillytavern.

use at least 6k context size with GPT 3.5 16k. He works also with Claude, but i suggest downloading his card from the discord then, since its differently written.
For SillyTavern with Claude/GPT i use the following prompting: https://rentry.org/pancatstack#instructions
Thanks to the creator! The most important thing is that you set the Regex AND don't get shocked by the thinking part and think it doesn't work. If you set the Regex, it works.
There is also a new one now: https://rentry.org/pancatbeta

CONTEXT SIZE: set to at least 6000.
MODEL: GPT 3.5 16k, GPT 4-1106 Preview(2023). Idk if JanitorLLM works too.
MAX NEW TOKENS: I always have it set to 300-500 tokens.

─────────── ⇦♕⇨ ───────────

**𝗢𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀:**
